meta.title: Kaminokuni Town Ski Area
meta.description: Free lifts · noon break 12:00–13:00 · Yunotai onsen & winery

hero.title:
Kaminokuni
Town Ski
hero.tagline: Free lift access—lifts stop 12:00–13:00 daily. Know the rules, pair with Yunotai.

transit.title:
The free hill
at Yunotai.
transit.lead: In Kaminokuni's Yunotai district—two T-bars and one rope tow, no chairlifts. Free grooming and night lighting. All lifts stop 12:00–13:00 for lunch break.
transit.imgAlt: Free municipal hill with T-bars and rope tow at Yunotai

primary.title: No lifts 12:00–13:00
primary.lead: One hour at noon—all surface lifts stop for staff break and maintenance. Check before traveling from far away; bilingual signage helps avoid surprises.
primary.imgAlt: Operations notice at the lodge—Kaminokuni's local rules

secondary.title: Surface lifts only
secondary.lead: Two T-bars and one rope tow—tricky for first-timers and snowboarders. Once you get the hang, enjoy ~300m runs for free.

nap.title:
Lunch break
means onsen.
nap.lead: Use the noon lift break for Yunotai Onsen (carbonated spring), cafe iroha, or Kaminokuni Winery—the Yunotai triangle, not the hill alone.
nap.imgAlt: Yunotai Onsen exterior—carbonated hot spring after skiing

recovery.title:
After skiing,
Yunotai waits.
recovery.lead: Highly rated Yunotai Onsen and the renovated Kaminokuni Winery & Satellite Office—the spend anchors after free skiing.
recovery.noticeBody: No chairlifts. Ask staff if you're new. Sundays close at 17:00. Hours vary with snow and weather.

trip.title:
Free skiing,
paid warmth & wine.
trip.lead: Morning runs → noon break at the onsen → afternoon and night skiing until 21:00—a Yunotai day model.

transit.title: Reading the noon break
transit.body: Every day from noon for one hour, all surface lifts stop—for maintenance and staff rest. Highlight bilingual hours at the top for visitors.

night.title: Night skiing & Sunday hours
night.body: Mon–Sat until 21:00. Sundays and some holidays until 17:00—show on a calendar at a glance.

handfree.title: Hands-free & stays
handfree.body: Limited on-site rental—confirm hands-free packages with nearby lodges. Yunotai Onsen stays are the classic pairing.

access.note: ~20 min by car from Kaminokuni Station · parking available
access.rentacarLink: 函館・大沼・松前でレンタカー予約
access.rentacarNote: スカイチケット（外部サイト）
access.rentacarHint: 上ノ国町民スキー場周辺のドライブ向け
